---
title: "RIP-seq: Hypoxia-Specific eIF3d Binding and TE Promotion"
author: "Kate"
date: "2026-05"
output: html_document
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```

```{r libraries}
library(here)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggvenn)
```

```{r constants}
RIP_LFC_CUT   <- 1
RIP_PADJ_CUT  <- 0.05
TE_LFC_CUT    <- 0.5
TE_PADJ_CUT   <- 0.05
NOR_LFC_LIMIT <- 0.5   # |te_lfc| in normoxia must be below this to qualify as "not regulated"
```

```{r load_data}
te_hyp <- read_csv(here("output", "translation_categories_si3d_vs_sictrl_hypoxia_1hr.csv")) |>
  mutate(gene_id_clean = sub("\\..*", "", gene_id))

te_nor <- read_csv(here("output", "translation_categories_si3d_vs_sictrl_normoxia_1and4hr.csv")) |>
  mutate(gene_id_clean = sub("\\..*", "", gene_id))

rip_hyp <- read_csv(here("ripseq", "output", "ripseq_deseq_hypoxia_1hr_flag_eif3d_vs_igg.csv"))
```

# Set Definitions

```{r set_a}
# Set A: eIF3d promotes TE in hypoxia 1hr
set_a <- te_hyp |>
  filter(!is.na(te_lfc), !is.na(te_padj), te_lfc > TE_LFC_CUT, te_padj < TE_PADJ_CUT)
cat("Set A (hypoxia TE promoted, LFC>0.5, padj<0.05):", nrow(set_a), "genes\n")
```

```{r set_b}
# Set B: |te_lfc| < 0.5 in normoxia (1+4hr time-normalized) -- not promoted or inhibited by eIF3d
set_b <- te_nor |>
  filter(!is.na(te_lfc), abs(te_lfc) < NOR_LFC_LIMIT)
cat("Set B (not regulated in normoxia, |LFC|<0.5):", nrow(set_b), "genes\n")
```

```{r set_c}
# Set C: hypoxia-specific TE promotion (A intersect B)
set_c <- inner_join(
  set_a |> dplyr::select(gene_id_clean, symbol, te_lfc, te_padj),
  set_b |> dplyr::select(gene_id_clean, te_lfc_normoxia = te_lfc, te_padj_normoxia = te_padj),
  by = "gene_id_clean"
)
cat("Set C (hypoxia-specific TE promoted, A intersect B):", nrow(set_c), "genes\n")
```

```{r set_d}
# Set D: eIF3d RIP-bound in hypoxia 1hr (FLAG3D enriched over IgG)
set_d <- rip_hyp |>
  filter(!is.na(log2FoldChange), !is.na(padj),
         log2FoldChange > RIP_LFC_CUT, padj < RIP_PADJ_CUT)
cat("Set D (RIP-bound hypoxia 1hr, LFC>1, padj<0.05):", nrow(set_d), "genes\n")
```

```{r final_overlap}
# Final gene list: hypoxia-specific TE promotion AND eIF3d-bound (C intersect D)
final_df <- inner_join(
  set_c,
  set_d |> dplyr::select(gene_id_clean, rip_lfc = log2FoldChange, rip_padj = padj),
  by = "gene_id_clean"
) |>
  arrange(desc(te_lfc))

cat("Final overlap (hypoxia-specific TE + RIP-bound):", nrow(final_df), "genes\n")
```

# Venn Diagram

```{r venn}
# Build a shared universe: genes present in all three datasets
joined_all <- te_hyp |>
  inner_join(
    te_nor |> dplyr::select(gene_id_clean, te_lfc_nor = te_lfc, te_padj_nor = te_padj),
    by = "gene_id_clean"
  ) |>
  inner_join(
    rip_hyp |> dplyr::select(gene_id_clean, rip_lfc = log2FoldChange, rip_padj = padj),
    by = "gene_id_clean"
  )

venn_list <- list(
  "Hypoxia TE promoted\n(LFC>0.5, padj<0.05)"  = joined_all$gene_id_clean[
    !is.na(joined_all$te_lfc) & joined_all$te_lfc > TE_LFC_CUT & joined_all$te_padj < TE_PADJ_CUT],
  "Not regulated normoxia\n(|LFC|<0.5)"          = joined_all$gene_id_clean[
    !is.na(joined_all$te_lfc_nor) & abs(joined_all$te_lfc_nor) < NOR_LFC_LIMIT],
  "FLAG3D RIP-bound\n(LFC>1, padj<0.05)"         = joined_all$gene_id_clean[
    !is.na(joined_all$rip_lfc) & joined_all$rip_lfc > RIP_LFC_CUT & joined_all$rip_padj < RIP_PADJ_CUT]
)

p_venn <- ggvenn(venn_list, fill_color = c("#E69F00", "grey60", "#56B4E9"), text_size = 3.5)
p_venn
ggsave(here("ripseq", "plots", "11_venn_hypoxia_specific_rip_te.pdf"), p_venn, width = 6, height = 5)
```

# Gene List

```{r gene_table}
final_df |>
  dplyr::select(symbol, gene_id_clean, te_lfc, te_padj, te_lfc_normoxia, te_padj_normoxia,
                rip_lfc, rip_padj) |>
  print(n = Inf)

final_df |> 
  head(n=50) |> 
  pull(symbol)
```

# Export

```{r export}
write_csv(final_df |>
            dplyr::select(gene_id_clean, symbol, te_lfc, te_padj,
                          te_lfc_normoxia, te_padj_normoxia, rip_lfc, rip_padj),
          here("ripseq", "output", "rip_te_hypoxia_specific_1hr.csv"))
cat("Saved", nrow(final_df), "genes to ripseq/output/rip_te_hypoxia_specific_1hr.csv\n")
```

# Candidate Gene Transcript Lookup

```{r candidate_transcripts}
target_symbols <- c(
  "NRIP1", "S100A11", "CHMP4C", "NDUFAF4", "PFDN6", "SOD1",
  "LAPTM4B", "AKR1C2", "L2HGDH", "PLPP3", "CAMTA1", "RAB7A"
)

# Transcript IDs from feature matrix (most-abundant transcript per gene from siCTRL
# normoxia Salmon TPM).
fm_ids <- readRDS(here("output", "predictive_modeling", "feature_matrix_external_stability.rds")) |>
  dplyr::select(transcript_id_clean, symbol)

# Build table from the data sources already loaded in this notebook.
candidate_tx <- tibble(symbol = target_symbols) |>
  left_join(
    te_hyp |>
      mutate(gene_id_clean = sub("\\..*", "", gene_id)) |>
      group_by(symbol) |>
      slice_min(te_padj, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) |>
      ungroup() |>
      dplyr::select(symbol, gene_id_clean, te_lfc_hyp = te_lfc, te_padj_hyp = te_padj),
    by = "symbol"
  ) |>
  left_join(
    te_nor |>
      mutate(gene_id_clean = sub("\\..*", "", gene_id)) |>
      dplyr::select(gene_id_clean, te_lfc_nor = te_lfc, te_padj_nor = te_padj),
    by = "gene_id_clean"
  ) |>
  left_join(
    rip_hyp |>
      dplyr::select(gene_id_clean, rip_lfc = log2FoldChange, rip_padj = padj),
    by = "gene_id_clean"
  ) |>
  left_join(fm_ids, by = "symbol") |>
  mutate(in_final_overlap = coalesce(gene_id_clean %in% final_df$gene_id_clean, FALSE))

candidate_tx |>
  dplyr::select(symbol, in_final_overlap,
                te_lfc_hyp, te_padj_hyp,
                te_lfc_nor, te_padj_nor,
                rip_lfc, rip_padj,
                transcript_id_clean) |>
  print(n = Inf)
```

```{r export_candidate_transcripts}
write_csv(
  candidate_tx |>
    dplyr::select(symbol, gene_id_clean, in_final_overlap,
                  te_lfc_hyp, te_padj_hyp, te_lfc_nor, te_padj_nor,
                  rip_lfc, rip_padj, transcript_id_clean),
  here("ripseq", "output", "11_candidate_gene_transcripts.csv")
)
cat("Saved", nrow(candidate_tx), "rows to ripseq/output/11_candidate_gene_transcripts.csv\n")
```

# Verify Hypoxia Expression and Extract 5'UTR Sequences

```{r verify_hypoxia_expression}
library(tximport)

metadata <- read_csv(here("accessories", "metadata_231_timecourse.csv"),
                     show_col_types = FALSE)

hyp_sictrl_ids <- metadata |>
  filter(type == "Input_Ribo_RNAseq", treatment == "siCTRL", condition == "hypoxia", hours == 1) |>
  pull(id)

salmon_dir <- here("2025_MDAcells_riboseq", "salmon")
hyp_files  <- file.path(salmon_dir, hyp_sictrl_ids, "quant.sf.gz")
names(hyp_files) <- hyp_sictrl_ids
hyp_files <- hyp_files[file.exists(hyp_files)]
cat("Hypoxia siCTRL 1hr RNA-seq samples:", length(hyp_files), "\n")

tx2gene_map <- read_tsv(
  here("accessories", "human", "tx2gene_hs_dm_v49_r111.tsv.gz"),
  col_names = c("transcript_id", "gene_id"), show_col_types = FALSE
) |>
  filter(str_starts(transcript_id, "ENST"))

txi_hyp <- tximport(hyp_files, type = "salmon", tx2gene = tx2gene_map, txOut = TRUE)

hyp_abundance <- txi_hyp$abundance |>
  as.data.frame() |>
  rownames_to_column("transcript_id") |>
  mutate(
    transcript_id_clean = sub("\\..*", "", transcript_id),
    gene_id_clean       = sub("\\..*", "",
      tx2gene_map$gene_id[match(transcript_id, tx2gene_map$transcript_id)])
  ) |>
  mutate(total_tpm = rowSums(across(where(is.numeric)), na.rm = TRUE))

hyp_check <- candidate_tx |>
  filter(!is.na(transcript_id_clean)) |>
  left_join(
    hyp_abundance |> dplyr::select(transcript_id_clean, hyp_tpm = total_tpm),
    by = "transcript_id_clean"
  ) |>
  left_join(
    hyp_abundance |>
      group_by(gene_id_clean) |>
      slice_max(total_tpm, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) |>
      ungroup() |>
      dplyr::select(gene_id_clean, top_tx_in_hypoxia = transcript_id_clean),
    by = "gene_id_clean"
  ) |>
  mutate(is_top_in_hypoxia = transcript_id_clean == top_tx_in_hypoxia)

cat("Transcript expression in hypoxia siCTRL 1hr:\n")
print(hyp_check |> dplyr::select(symbol, transcript_id_clean, hyp_tpm, is_top_in_hypoxia))

stopifnot(
  "All candidate transcripts must be expressed in hypoxia siCTRL" =
    all(hyp_check$hyp_tpm > 0, na.rm = TRUE)
)

# For genes where the normoxia-selected transcript is not the dominant isoform in
# hypoxia, switch to the hypoxia-dominant transcript for the Benchling export.
switched <- hyp_check |> filter(!is_top_in_hypoxia)
if (nrow(switched) > 0) {
  cat("Switching to hypoxia-dominant transcript for:",
      paste(switched$symbol, collapse = ", "), "\n")
  cat("  ", paste(switched$symbol, switched$transcript_id_clean, "->",
                  switched$top_tx_in_hypoxia, collapse = "\n  "), "\n")
}

tx_for_benchling <- hyp_check |>
  mutate(transcript_id_final = if_else(is_top_in_hypoxia, transcript_id_clean, top_tx_in_hypoxia)) |>
  dplyr::select(symbol, gene_id_clean, transcript_id_final)
```

```{r extract_utr5_sequences}
library(GenomicFeatures)
library(BSgenome.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38)

txdb   <- loadDb(here("accessories", "human", "txdb.gencode49.sqlite"))
genome <- BSgenome.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38

tx_version_map <- tx_for_benchling |>
  left_join(
    tx2gene_map |>
      mutate(transcript_id_clean = sub("\\..*", "", transcript_id)) |>
      dplyr::select(transcript_id_clean, transcript_id_versioned = transcript_id),
    by = c("transcript_id_final" = "transcript_id_clean")
  )

utr5_all  <- fiveUTRsByTranscript(txdb, use.names = TRUE)
target_utr5 <- utr5_all[names(utr5_all) %in% tx_version_map$transcript_id_versioned]
utr5_seqs   <- extractTranscriptSeqs(genome, target_utr5)

seq_df <- tx_version_map |>
  mutate(utr5_sequence = as.character(utr5_seqs[transcript_id_versioned])) |>
  dplyr::select(symbol, transcript_id_final, utr5_sequence) |>
  arrange(match(symbol, target_symbols))

missing_utr5 <- seq_df |> filter(is.na(utr5_sequence)) |> pull(symbol)
if (length(missing_utr5) > 0) cat("No annotated 5'UTR for:", paste(missing_utr5, collapse = ", "), "\n")

cat("5'UTR lengths (bp):\n")
print(seq_df |> dplyr::select(symbol, utr5_length = nchar(utr5_sequence)))
```

```{r export_benchling}
benchling_df <- seq_df |>
  filter(!is.na(utr5_sequence)) |>
  mutate(
    Name  = paste0(symbol, " 5UTR (", transcript_id_final, ")"),
    Bases = utr5_sequence
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(Name, Bases)

stopifnot("Benchling names must be unique" = !anyDuplicated(benchling_df$Name))

write_csv(benchling_df, here("ripseq", "output", "11_benchling_import.csv"))
cat("Saved", nrow(benchling_df), "5'UTR sequences to ripseq/output/11_benchling_import.csv\n")
```
